market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Cozy Marina Retreat – Walk to Waterfront
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your modern 2‑bedroom flat nestled in a vibrant marina development. This entire‑home retreat comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it perfect for families, friends, or couples seeking a waterfront escape. Every night you’ll enjoy a bright open‑plan living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and two stylish bedrooms with plush bedding. The flat’s contemporary décor, large windows, and balcony views let the marina’s relaxed vibe flow right into your stay.

Rated 4.78 out of 5 based on 257 glowing reviews, Claude’s flat consistently earns praise for cleanliness, location, and value. With a nightly rate of £109 – a striking 38 % lower than the city’s median of £175 – you’re getting premium comfort without the premium price tag. Over the next 90 days the calendar shows 53 open nights (41.3 % booked), presenting a prime opportunity to fill those dates with the right guests.

Located steps from the water, you’ll be within easy walking distance of restaurants, shops, and leisure activities. Whether you’re watching the boats glide by from the balcony, cooking a meal in the modern kitchen, or exploring the surrounding attractions, this flat offers the perfect blend of convenience and charm. Book now and experience the marina lifestyle at an unbeatable price.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space (e.g., balcony or terrace with marina view)
Entertainment options (e.g., smart TV, streaming services, board games)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright living‑area or marina‑view photo as the cover image, as it instantly showcases the property’s location and space.
key_diagnosis: Title currently ignores the -38% price advantage; rewrite the headline to highlight £109 vs the cohort median £175 to capture price‑sensitive travelers.
The description is essentially empty; add a compelling 200‑300 word copy that leverages the 4.78 rating, 257 reviews, and 53 open nights to create urgency.
No high‑value amenities are listed; add Outdoor (balcony), Parking, and Entertainment amenities to meet market expectations and boost perceived value.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your flat is priced 38% below the city median (£109 vs £175) yet only 41% booked – a stronger headline could turn those 53 open nights into bookings.
